name: rizin-cutter
title: rizin-cutter
summary: reverse engineering platform powered by rizin
description:
reverse engineering platform powered by rizin
Cutter is a free and open-source reverse engineering platform powered by
rizin. It aims at being an advanced and customizable reverse engineering
platform while keeping the user experience in mind. Cutter is created by
reverse engineers for reverse engineers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cutter because reverse engineering platform powered by rizin.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cutter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cutter [options] [args]` as documented upstream for cutter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cutter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cutter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
